name: Veal Cutlets with Capers
recipeInstructions:
1. Sprinkle cutlets with lemon juice and season with salt, pepper, and paprika.
2. Heat oil in a frying pan and fry cutlets for 3 minutes on the first side.
3. Turn cutlets over and add drained capers to the pan. Fry again for 3 minutes; remove cutlets and arrange on a preheated platter.
4. Pour wine into the pan, scraping loose any brown particles from the bottom of the frying pan. Add bay leaf and simmer liquid for 3 minutes. Remove bay leaf.
5. Blend in evaporated milk and adjust seasonings. Pour over cutlets.
6. Cut beets into strips and arrange on lettuce leaves as a garnish.
